get.description: Retrieve a cursor-paginated list of processed organization documents.

post.description: Upload a document file to the organization study processing pipeline.

201.description: Document uploaded and processing queued successfully.

get.description: Retrieve metadata details of a specific organization document.

delete.description: Permantently delete a document, its chunks, storage objects, and vector embeddings.

get.description: Retrieve all interactive study chat sessions for the authenticated organization.

post.description: Create a new study chat session to begin discussing documents.
Post a message into a chat session and receive a streaming Server-Sent Events (SSE) AI response.

get.description: Retrieve a list of generated study quizzes for the organization.

post.description: Generate a new automated study quiz from organization documents or chat context.

get.description: Retrieve questions and answers of a specific study quiz.

post.description: Submit quiz responses to receive a graded score and trigger adaptive mastery adjustments.

200.description: Quiz responses submitted and graded successfully.

get.description: Retrieve high-level study statistics, study durations, quiz attempt counts, and current streak days.
Retrieve a list of mastery scores and classification levels grouped by topic.
Retrieve day-by-day aggregates of flashcard reviews, quizzes taken, and total study duration over the last 14 days.

post.description: Create a new outbound webhook endpoint to receive organization event notifications. The generated HMAC signature secret is returned exactly once in the response.

201.description: Webhook endpoint registered and HMAC secret generated successfully.

get.description: Retrieve the raw OpenAPI Swagger specification for this platform.
Retrieve requests per day, error rate, and average latency over the last 30 days.

info.title: Study Assistant Public API
info.description: Production-grade developer APIs for AI Study Assistant Platform

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Enter your API Key prefixed with Bearer (e.g. Bearer ska_live_...)
